name: landing-page-summary
description: Recreation-quality landing page summarizer. Headless Playwright browser, 17-section markdown spec, in-system changelog, always re-fetches by default. Re-run any time to refresh — no scheduled routine.

installs.purpose: Local routing index for saved landing page summaries

Global INDEX.md routing entry for the saved-summaries library. The skill itself is auto-discovered via Runneth's available-skills mechanism and is intentionally not indexed (per Runneth's rule: do not index /agent/.agents/skills/).

changelog.notes: Removed the weekly refresh routine offer (the 'LP library weekly refresh' reminder with its discover/diff/prune/retire/hygiene/flag/report phases) and the routines declaration. Refresh is on-demand: re-run the skill on a known URL and it re-fetches, archives the prior version to _history/, and notes material changes. The extraction pipeline, the 17-section output spec, the H2 anchors in DATA-CONTRACT.md, and the archive-before-overwrite changelog are unchanged.
Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial PR-ready release. Dynamic Playwright path discovery, always re-fetch by default (--use-cached opt-in), archive-before-overwrite page history, and an optional self-closing weekly LP-library refresh routine.

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.
